message:
🌱 Add kubevirt: Allow for customization of virt-operator created mission (#921)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubevirt-3365-allow-for-customization-of-virt-operator-created-deployments-daemo",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubevirt: Allow for customization of virt-operator created deployments, daemonset",
+    "description": "Allow for customization of virt-operator created deployments, daemonset. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubevirt deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your virtctl version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nhelm list -n kubevirt 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kubevirt installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubevirt configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubevirt configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl get configmap -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevirt\n```\n**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**:\r\n\n**What you expected to happen**:\n\nAllow arbitrary json patches to be provided to virt-operator in order to customize virt-handler daemonset, virt-api deployment, and virt-controller deployment."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Allow for customization of virt-operator created\u2026",
+        "description": "If Kubelet is not using a standard --root-dir, virt-handler\nwon't detect containerdisks properly. This moves from a\nhard-coded \"/var/lib/kubelet/pods\" path to a configurable\none so virt-handler's paths can match the Kubelet's view.\n\nThere's a separate issue (edit: #3365) for exposing configurables like these through the operator, via merging JSON docs. I don't suspect this will be usable for most until this happens, unless they edit the daemonset after deployment.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl get events -n kubevirt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Allow for customization of virt-operator created\u2026\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "If Kubelet is not using a standard --root-dir, virt-handler\nwon't detect containerdisks properly. This moves from a\nhard-coded \"/var/lib/kubelet/pods\" path to a configurable\none so virt-handler's paths can match the Kubelet's view.\n\nThere's a separate issue (edit: #3365) for exposing configurables like these through the operator, via merging JSON docs.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kubevirt",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kubevirt"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Daemonset",
+      "VirtualMachineInstance"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/issues/3365",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/pull/3427"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "virtctl",
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kubevirt installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
